buildCommand: NODE_ENV=production pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && NODE_ENV=production PORT=3000 pnpm --filter @workspace/wallet-tracer run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://challenges.cloudflare.com; frame-src https://challenges.cloudflare.com; connect-src 'self' https:; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:
